features.title: Everything you need.
features.subtitle: From application to placement — HYRE automates your entire recruiting process.
features.cv_parsing_desc: Automatic extraction of skills, experience and qualifications from CVs in seconds.
features.pipeline_desc: Drag & drop candidate management with 14 configurable stages and real-time updates.

cta.title: Ready to get started?

hero.description: HYRE Acquire generates qualified decision-maker meetings for staffing agencies. Our AI identifies, qualifies and schedules meetings — you only pay on success.

workflow.subtitle: How it works
workflow.title: From target audience to meeting in 4 steps.

steps.title: Define Target Audience
steps.description: Together we define your ideal clients: industry, company size, region and contacts.

steps.title: AI Qualification
steps.description: Our AI analyzes thousands of companies, identifies demand signals and qualifies prospects automatically.

steps.title: Outreach & Scheduling
steps.description: Personalized multi-channel campaigns via email, LinkedIn and phone generate qualified meetings.

steps.title: Meeting & Close
steps.description: You lead the conversation with a pre-qualified decision-maker. We provide briefing and contact history.

pricing.subtitle: Pricing
pricing.title: EUR 250 per Meeting
pricing.description: Purely performance-based — no fixed costs, no risks. You only pay for qualified meetings that actually take place.

pilot.title: Start your pilot.
pilot.description: Test HYRE Acquire risk-free. We start with a defined pilot project and scale on success.

hero.subtitle: About HYRE
hero.title: Recruiting technology from Berlin.
hero.description: HYRE was founded to modernize the recruiting market for staffing agencies. We combine AI, automation and deep industry expertise.

story.title: Our Story
story.p1: HYRE was born from the conviction that staffing agencies deserve better technology. Too often, agencies rely on manual processes, outdated software and expensive, inefficient acquisition methods.
story.p2: As founders with experience in Vendor Management Systems, Process Mining and AI technology, we built HYRE to solve exactly these problems — with a platform designed specifically for the needs of staffing agencies.
story.p3: Today, with HYRE Acquire, our SaaS platform and HYRE Consulting, we offer three complementary pillars that cover the entire value chain for staffing agencies.

pillars.title: Three Pillars. One Goal.
pillars.subtitle: The HYRE ecosystem for modern staffing agencies.

items.label: Services
items.title: HYRE Acquire
items.description: AI-powered meeting generation and client acquisition for staffing agencies. Purely performance-based — EUR 250 per qualified meeting.

items.label: Platform
items.title: HYRE SaaS
items.description: The all-in-one recruiting platform with Kanban pipeline, AI CV parsing, white-label portal and analytics — from EUR 999/month.

items.label: Consulting
items.title: HYRE Consulting
items.description: Direct placement of specialists and executives for companies. Specialized in IT, Finance and Engineering.

items.title: Performance over Promises
items.description: We measure ourselves by results. Whether Acquire meetings or platform KPIs — everything is transparent and traceable.

items.title: Technology with Industry Expertise
items.description: We don't build generic tools. Every feature is specifically designed for the needs of staffing agencies.

items.title: Partnership over Service
items.description: We see ourselves as partners of our clients. Your success is our success — that's why we work performance-based.

items.title: Made in Germany
items.description: GDPR-compliant, German servers, German support. Recruiting technology you can trust.

imprint.title: Imprint
imprint.disclaimer_text: The contents of our pages were created with the greatest care. However, we cannot guarantee the accuracy, completeness and timeliness of the content.

sections.title: 1. Privacy at a Glance
sections.content: The following notes provide a simple overview of what happens to your personal data when you visit our website.

sections.title: 2. Responsible Party
sections.content:
Responsible for data processing on this website is:

HYRE
Hüsnü Güley
Berlin, Germany
Email: info@huehyre.de

sections.title: 3. Data Collection on Our Website
sections.content: Data processing on this website is carried out by the website operator. When you visit our website, information is automatically stored in server log files that your browser automatically transmits to us.

sections.title: 4. Contact Form
sections.content: If you send us inquiries via the contact form, your details from the inquiry form including the contact data you provided will be stored by us for the purpose of processing the inquiry.

sections.title: 5. Hosting
sections.content: This website is hosted by Vercel Inc. The servers are located in the EU. Vercel processes data in accordance with the GDPR.

sections.title: 6. Your Rights
sections.content: You have the right at any time to receive free information about the origin, recipient and purpose of your stored personal data. You also have the right to request the correction or deletion of this data.

sections.title: 1. Scope
sections.content: These General Terms and Conditions apply to all contracts between HYRE and its customers for the provision of services in the field of recruiting technology and staffing services.

sections.title: 2. Scope of Services
sections.content: The scope of services results from the respective service description and the individual offer. Changes to the scope of services require written agreement.

sections.title: 3. Remuneration
sections.content: Remuneration is based on the applicable price list or individual offer. For performance-based models (e.g., HYRE Acquire), remuneration is only due when the defined success occurs.

sections.title: 4. Confidentiality
sections.content: Both parties undertake to treat all confidential information that becomes known in the course of cooperation as confidential and not to disclose it to third parties.

sections.title: 5. Liability
sections.content: HYRE's liability is limited to intent and gross negligence. Liability for indirect damages and lost profits is excluded to the extent permitted by law.

sections.title: 6. Final Provisions
sections.content: The law of the Federal Republic of Germany applies. The place of jurisdiction for all disputes is Berlin, provided the customer is a merchant.

footer.tagline: AI-powered recruiting technology for staffing agencies.
